allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('react-icons/io'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linkedin'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('facebook'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dribbble'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('figma'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('react-icons/ai'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linkedin'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twitter'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('facebook'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('youtube'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dribbble'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('figma'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")
